description: A 'WANTED' card. The top fifth of the image is a bold red banner with the word 'WANTED' in large white all-caps sans-serif type. Below, against a near-black textured background, is a centered photograph styled as an instant print with a white border and drop shadow. The photo is a frontal portrait of a young man (Ivan Archivaldo Guzman Salazar) with short dark hair, wearing a dark jacket over an open-collared white shirt, photographed against a marked wall. Beneath the photo, in dark condensed serif caps on the white card, is the caption: 'SINALOA CARTEL LEADER / CONSPIRACY TO DISTRIBUTE A CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE, RUNNING A CONTINUING CRIMINAL ENTERPRISE & MONEY LAUNDERING.' At the bottom, white text reads 'SEND TIPS TO' above a large '866-DHS-2-ICE' number, a short red divider rule, and the ICE seal and wordmark. The palette is red, black, and white. The tweet states a $10M reward.
notable_text: WANTED | SINALOA CARTEL LEADER | CONSPIRACY TO DISTRIBUTE A CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE, RUNNING A CONTINUING CRIMINAL ENTERPRISE & MONEY LAUNDERING | SEND TIPS TO 866-DHS-2-ICE | ICE
